query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.subtotal, o.sgst, o.cgst, o.total, o.paymentMethod, o.status,
       oi.id as itemId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.totalPrice, oi.isComplimentary
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.orderId = o.id
WHERE o.orderNumber = '00887';
